title: Copper Rails Mod
body:
# Copper Rails Mod
This mod adds the regular, powered, detector and activator rail variants that can be made from copper!

Recipes for the rails are the same as other rails, except for using copper. This mod does not replace the regular rails in the game, so you can still make them.

Install the mod by downloading and placing the .jar file in the mods folder of your game instance.
